events.title: IBA Judges Forum: In defence of justice
events.summary: A judicial forum examining challenges to justice systems and the role of judges in upholding the rule of law across jurisdictions.

events.title: Judicial independence as the key cornerstone for Syria's democratic transition: how to address the risk of capture and ensure fair administration of justice, impartiality and accountability
events.summary: Webinar examining judicial independence in Syria's democratic transition, focusing on preventing capture and ensuring fair, impartial, accountable justice administration.

events.title: Recognition and enforcement of annulled awards: a comparative approach across jurisdictions and strategic considerations
events.summary: Webinar comparing jurisdictional approaches to recognizing and enforcing annulled arbitration awards, with strategic guidance for practitioners.

events.title: Arbitration in Challenging Times
events.summary: Joint international webinar exploring arbitration practice during challenging geopolitical and economic conditions.

events.title: Towards qualified capital defence in Asia: introduction to the KL Guidelines
events.summary: Webinar introducing the Kuala Lumpur Guidelines on qualified capital defence representation in Asia, addressing standards for death penalty cases.

events.title: Transnational tort litigation: strategy, risk and damages
events.summary: Webinar covering strategic considerations, risk assessment, and damages in cross-border tort litigation.

events.title: Young ICCA Workshop - Soft Skills para Profissionais de Arbitragem
events.summary: A Young ICCA workshop focusing on soft skills development for arbitration professionals, conducted in Portuguese in São Paulo.

events.title: ACI's Forum on Cartels, TCOs & Compliance in Latin America
events.summary: Two-day forum focusing on cartels, transnational criminal organizations, and compliance issues specific to Latin America, held at the DC Bar Association.

events.title: Corporate Counsel & Compliance Exchange USA 2026
events.summary: Exchange event bringing together Chief Legal Officers, General Counsel and Chief Compliance Officers from major US organizations.

events.title: Delos-Y Tokyo Breakfast
events.summary: A networking breakfast organized by Delos-Y (the young practitioners network of Delos Dispute Resolution) in Tokyo, bringing together professionals interested in international arbitration and dispute resolution.

events.title: North East Branch Mock Mediation - Another brick in the wall
events.summary: Interactive mock mediation event combining entertainment, professional development, and practical learning. Hosted by CIArb's North East Branch for members and practitioners.

events.title: North East Branch Mock Mediation - Another brick in the wall
events.organiser: Chartered Institute of Arbitrators (CIArb) - North East Branch
events.summary: Interactive mock mediation exercise combining entertainment, professional development, and practical learning for mediation practitioners in the North East region.

events.title: North East Branch Mock Mediation - Another brick in the wall
events.summary: Interactive mock mediation exercise combining entertainment, professional development, and practical learning in dispute resolution techniques.

events.title: Walking Through the Ciarb International Arbitration Professional Practice Guidelines
events.organiser: CIArb East Asia, UAE, Malaysia & Singapore Branches
events.summary: Webinar series examining CIArb's International Arbitration Professional Practice Guidelines, jointly presented by four regional branches.

events.title: 43rd Cambridge International Symposium on Economic Crime
events.organiser: Cambridge International Symposium on Economic Crime
events.costDisplay: Full week and day tickets available (see registration form)
events.summary: Week-long symposium at Jesus College Cambridge covering economic crime topics including fraud, money laundering, bribery, and enforcement. Includes sessions, meals, and optional accommodation. Day tickets available for flexible attendance.

events.title: From Positions to Outcomes: Negotiation in Practice – a Young ICCA Skills Workshop
events.summary: Practical skills workshop on negotiation techniques and strategies for arbitration practitioners, covering transition from positions to outcomes.

events.title: YIAG & CIArb YMG Fireside Chat and Meet & Mingle in Singapore
events.summary: Informal Q&A session with LCIA Director General Kevin Nash and Deputy Director General Jamie Harrison, followed by networking for younger arbitration practitioners in Singapore.

events.title: From Positions to Outcomes: Negotiation in Practice
events.summary: A practical skills workshop on negotiation techniques for arbitration advocates, exploring strategies from initial positions to final settlements.

events.title: LCIA Seminar in Singapore
events.summary: Part of Singapore Convention Week. Seminar featuring LCIA Rules introduction, panel discussion, and interactive forum with networking reception.

events.title: LCIA Tylney in Town Symposium in Singapore
events.summary: Interactive symposium during Singapore Convention Week following the traditional LCIA Tylney-style format, with topics submitted by delegates in advance for open forum discussion.

events.title: ICC United Kingdom Delegation Visit to the ICC International Court of Arbitration
events.costDisplay: Please get in touch to find out more - arbitration@iccwbo.uk
events.summary: Delegation visit to the ICC International Court of Arbitration in Paris for UK members and invited guests to engage with the institution and learn about international arbitration processes.

events.title: LCIA Tylney Hall Symposia
events.summary: Two-day symposium at Tylney Hall following the long-established LCIA tradition of open forum discussion based on topics submitted by delegates in advance.

events.title: YIAG Tylney Hall Symposium
events.summary: Half-day symposium preceding the LCIA Tylney Hall Symposium, featuring open forum discussion on topics submitted by delegates in advance.

events.title: Arbitration and ADR Committee Meeting
events.costDisplay: Members & invite only. Please get in touch to find out more - arbitration@iccwbo.uk
events.summary: Committee meeting for ICC UK members and invited arbitration and ADR practitioners to discuss current developments and policy issues in dispute resolution.

events.title: Side Event of the Berlin Dispute Resolution Days
events.summary: Side event examining ongoing reforms to arbitration frameworks and shifts in international dispute resolution practice.

events.title: Istanbul Arbitration Days
events.summary: Multi-day arbitration conference and events in Istanbul. LCIA supporting organisation for this regional arbitration gathering in Turkey.

events.title: LCIA Tylney in Town Symposium in Berlin
events.summary: Symposium during Berlin Dispute Resolution Days following the traditional LCIA Tylney-style format, based on topics submitted by delegates in advance.

events.title: LCIA Tylney in Town Symposium in Copenhagen
events.summary: Symposium following the traditional LCIA Tylney-style format, based on topics submitted by delegates in advance of the event.

events.organiser: CIArb New York Branch & Columbia Law School
events.summary: Four-day intensive course exploring the law and practice of international arbitration at Columbia Law School.

events.title: 4th Annual Women in AML & Sanctions Forum
events.summary: Two-day forum focusing on anti-money laundering and sanctions compliance, with emphasis on women professionals in financial crime prevention.

events.title: Annual Arbitration & ADR Conference
events.summary: Two-day flagship conference covering current developments in international arbitration and alternative dispute resolution, featuring leading practitioners and arbitrators.

events.summary: Symposium during Australia Arbitration Week following the traditional LCIA Tylney-style format, with topics submitted by delegates in advance.

events.summary: An online session exploring career pathways and opportunities in mediation practice, organised by the Chartered Institute of Arbitrators.

events.summary: Two-day conference with speaker panels addressing various topics in energy dispute resolution, featuring leading advocates, counsel, experts and arbitrators in interactive format.
